title: aureolaria skinneriana var. asperula
intro: Aureolaria skinneriana var. asperula, also known as the Skinner's twiststalk, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aureolaria skinneriana var. asperula include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as soothing digestive problems and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
